name: Fangyikang Wang
subtitle: M.Eng. Student in Computer Science, Zhejiang University
summary:
I am currently a research scientist at [Minimax](https://www.minimax.io/). My research interest includes video generation, fast inference of generative models and theoretical understanding of generative models. I am active at the top international AI conferences such as NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR.

I received both my bachelor's and master's degrees from the Department of Computer Science and Technology, Zhejiang University (浙江大学计算机科学与技术学院), under the supervision of [Prof. Hui Qian](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=n4csXw0AAAAJ&hl=en) and Prof. Chao Zhang. I also collaborate closely with Hubery Yin, [Dr. Li Chen](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=WDJL3gYAAAAJ&hl=en) (WeChat Vision), Dr. Zebang Shen (ETH Zurich), and [Prof. Mingming Gong](https://mingming-gong.github.io/) (MBZUAI & UniMelb).
